failure_reasons: **AC-EXPORT-001 NOT MET:** The export dialog that opens from the machine editor (via "📤 导出" button) shows the OLD ExportModal with 8 format options and PNG resolution presets (1x/2x/4x), but the acceptance criterion explicitly requires "quality preset (Standard/High)". The new ExportDialog.tsx with Standard/High presets exists and passes 14 tests, but is NOT integrated into the main UI.
